packages.changelog: Baseline ECU configuration. Speed: 10-120 km/h, SoC drain: 0.05%/cycle, Cabin: 19.5-24.5 C.
Performance update: extended speed range (20-150 km/h), optimized SoC drain (0.03%/cycle), wider cabin temp range (18-26 C).
M15/M16: Alpamayo-1 LoRA policy checkpoint (highway-v0, FP16→INT4). Populate sha256 after training-dispatcher job completes.
